summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The Vanguard Short Duration Tax-Exempt Bond ETF (VSDM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of USD-denominated tax-exempt municipal bonds with an average duration of 1.5 to 5 years. The fund may hold up to 20% in below investment-grade bonds. VSDM was launched on Nov 19, 2024 and is issued by Vanguard.
